\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$] \textbf{The Master Hamiltonian.} The total energy operator of the unified system, comprising the tunneling, superconducting, and cymatic interaction terms. \[ H_{Trawin} = H_{tunnel} + H_{ER} + H_{SC} + H_{cymatic} + H_{TZP} \] \item[$
\]
